name: Batch review — analyze multiple PRs, summary bar, dashboard rows
description: User navigates to /batch, pastes 3 PR URLs, sees the URL counter update to 3/5, clicks Analyze All, watches the progress bar and per-PR status indicators, waits for completion, sees 3 stacked review cards and a summary bar, then navigates to /dashboard and confirms 3 new rows were added.

planSteps.description: The page shows a textarea labeled with placeholder text about pasting one PR URL per line, and an 'Analyze All' button
Paste the following 3 URLs into the textarea, one per line: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1, https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/2, https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/3
The URL counter badge shows '3/5 PRs'
All 3 URLs are shown with a green checkmark (✓) indicating they are valid
A progress bar is visible and the button text changes to include 'Analyzing'
Each of the 3 PR URLs shows a status indicator (⏳, 🔄, ✅, or ❌)
Wait for all 3 PRs to finish analyzing (all status indicators should be ✅ or ❌)
A summary bar is visible showing the number of PRs analyzed, an average score, and verdict counts
At least 1 review report card is visible on the page showing score, verdict, and summary content
The dashboard table shows recent entries — at least the PRs from the batch analysis appear as rows
